results.question: What are the symptoms of heart failure?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "heart failure" RETURN s.name AS symptom
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom)
WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "heart failure"
RETURN s.name AS symptom

results.question: Which drugs treat tuberculosis?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "tuberculosis" RETURN dr.name AS drug
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (t:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug)
WHERE toLower(t.name) CONTAINS "tuberculosis"
RETURN dr.name AS drug

results.question: Which diseases share the same treatment as asthma?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug)<-[:TREATED_BY]-(d2:Disease) WHERE toLower(d1.name) CONTAINS "asthma" AND d1 <> d2 RETURN d2.name AS disease, dr.name AS drug
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:Disease {name: "asthma"}), (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug)
WHERE d <> a AND dr IN ((d)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr))
RETURN d.name AS disease, dr.name AS treatment

results.question: Which drug is used to treat the most diseases?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) RETURN dr.name AS drug, COUNT(d) AS disease_count ORDER BY disease_count DESC LIMIT 1
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug)
RETURN dr.name AS drug, COUNT(d) AS disease_count
ORDER BY disease_count DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: What are all the drugs and symptoms associated with lung cancer?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom), (d)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "lung cancer" RETURN s.name AS symptom, dr.name AS drug
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (lc:Disease {name: 'lung cancer'})-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom), (lc)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug)
RETURN s.name AS symptom, dr.name AS drug

results.question: Bệnh viêm gan B có triệu chứng gì?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "hepatitis b" RETURN s.name AS symptom
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (b:Bệnh)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s:Symptom)
WHERE toLower(b.name) CONTAINS "viêm gan b"
RETURN s.name AS symptom

results.question: Thuốc nào chữa bệnh trầm cảm?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS "depression" RETURN dr.name AS drug
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS " trầm cảm" RETURN dr.name AS drug

results.question: Bệnh nào có cả triệu chứng mệt mỏi và khó thở?
results.expected_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s1:Symptom), (d)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s2:Symptom) WHERE toLower(s1.name) CONTAINS "fatigue" AND toLower(s2.name) CONTAINS "shortness of breath" RETURN d.name AS disease
results.generated_cypher:
MATCH (d:Disease)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s1:Symptom),
     (d)-[:HAS_SYMPTOM]->(s2:Symptom)
   WHERE toLower(s1.name) CONTAINS "mệt mỏi" AND toLower(s2.name) CONTAINS "khó thở"
   RETURN d.name AS disease

results.question: Có bao nhiêu loại thuốc trong hệ thống?
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:TREATED_BY]->(dr:Drug) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT dr.name) AS total_drugs

results.question: Thời tiết hôm nay thế nào?
